title: Sour Crunchy Brazilian Fettuccine Poach
description: This romantic and indulgent dish features a unique blend of sourness from fermented vegetables mixed with a crunchy texture created by poaching fettuccine noodles, all infused with the vibrant flavors of Brazil.
instructions: Prepare the fettuccine according to package instructions, ensuring they are not overcooked.
In a small saucepan, mix the fermented vegetables with lemon juice and ginger paste. Simmer gently for about 5 minutes until heated through.
Add the minced garlic and red pepper flakes (if using) to the saucepan and simmer for an additional minute to infuse flavors.
Drain the fettuccine, reserving some pasta water in case of sticking during cooking. Add drained noodles into the saucepan with the fermented vegetables mixture, toss gently to coat evenly.
Gently stir in a pinch of salt and red pepper flakes (if using) for additional flavor.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
